answer: Decompose the 128-bit value into four 32-bit lanes: a = (uint32)x.lo, b = (uint32)(x.lo >> 32), c = (uint32)x.hi, d = (uint32)(x.hi >> 32). Clamp n to 0..31 with n &= 31. For each lane compute r = (lane << n) | (lane >> (32 - n)) when n != 0 (the shift by 32 is avoided), then reconstruct: x.lo = ((uint64)b << 32) | a; x.hi = ((uint64)d << 32) | c; return x;
